backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management, custom links, and vault notes with role-based access control via a MixinAuthorization mixin and persistent Map/Set storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two high-confidence features: ensuring AuthGuard defers routing until `isInitializing` settles, and ensuring `useActorReady` only returns true when init is settled, principal is non-anonymous, and actor is non-null.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's purpose, key patterns, and notable fixes across the AstraVault React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including backgrounds, borders, chart colors, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the AstraVault SPA, mounting the React app at `#root` and loading `src/main.tsx` as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router tree with a `RootLayout` that shows a military-themed loading spinner only during the first initialization pass, then renders protected and public routes via `ProtectedRoute` and `LoginPage`.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Collapsible sidebar component rendering navigation links, categorized default quick-links with expand/collapse, custom links per category, and an Add Link button that opens `CustomLinkManager`.
frontend/src/components/CustomLinkManage: A dialog-based UI component for managing custom links, supporting add, edit, and delete operations with form validation, icon selection, and custom category support.
A simple footer component that displays developer credit text in a styled bar at the bottom of the dashboard.
The top navigation header for the dashboard, featuring a sidebar toggle, secure connection indicator, and a user profile dropdown with logout functionality.
A layout wrapper component that composes the header, collapsible sidebar, main content area with a background texture, and footer into the full dashboard shell.
frontend/src/components/DeleteAccountCon: An alert dialog that requires the user to type 'DELETE' to confirm permanent account deletion, then calls the delete mutation and clears the session.
frontend/src/components/IconPicker.tsx: A searchable grid icon picker component that filters available icons by name and highlights the currently selected icon.
frontend/src/components/LogoutConfirmati: An alert dialog that asks the user to confirm logout, then clears the Internet Identity session and query cache before navigating to the login page.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A full-screen modal form for new user registration that collects name, username, email, and vault password, hashes the password with SHA-256, and submits it via the registerUser mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: A route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication and actor readiness, showing loaders or error screens as needed, and rendering a profile setup modal for new users or the protected outlet for authenticated users with profiles.
frontend/src/data/defaultLinks.ts: Defines default bookmark link categories (Bank, Email, Investment, Services, Payments) with associated URLs and Lucide icons, plus an icon map and exported aliases for backward compatibility.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActorReady.ts: A hook that returns true only when Internet Identity has finished initializing, the user has a non-anonymous identity, and the backend actor instance is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook that manage AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flows, and expose identity state and status flags to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for CRUD operations on user profiles, custom links, and vault notes, all gated on actor readiness and scoped to the current user's principal.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Rajdhani and Inter fonts, configures Tailwind with a military-themed dark color palette using CSS custom properties, and defines utility classes for gold and military-green design tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a welcome banner, stat cards for default links, custom links, and vault notes counts, plus a quick-access grid for navigating to app sections.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, redirecting already-authenticated users to the dashboard and showing a branded UI with a login button.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page allowing users to update their profile, change their vault password, toggle email 2FA, and delete their account, with form validation and query invalidation on success.
frontend/src/pages/VaultPage.tsx: Encrypted vault page where users unlock their notes with a password, then can add, edit, view, and delete AES-256-GCM encrypted notes entirely client-side.
frontend/src/utils/encryption.ts: Client-side AES-256-GCM encryption utilities using the Web Crypto API, providing encryptNote, decryptNote, and hashPassword functions with PBKDF2 key derivation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with military-inspired custom colors (gold accents, military greens, dark surfaces), custom fonts (Rajdhani, Inter), box shadows, animations, and enabling plugins for animate, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (version 25) describing AstraVault's full-stack architecture, existing features, known issues (infinite spinner, broken login, missing Google Calendar widget), and overall app summary including auth, vault encryption, and UI design decisions.
